name: (REVAMPED) Huohuo
description:
ADDED NEW INITIAL SCENARIOS

1) User and Huohuo already know each other, Huohuo is here to spend an afternoon at user's house.

2) Huohuo is assigned an exorcism job by the Ten-Lords Commission, with a partner she does not know. User is the partner.

3) Huohuo is doing her patrols around the Fyxestroll Garden, when she runs into user. Up to you if she knows you already or not.

4) Empty message to come up with whatever you want.

Huohuo from Honkai: Star Rail. The bot is made mainly for wholesome romance fluff, remaining as accurate as possible to her canon personality. Tail not included.
creator: SUPAH_SUPAH_SUPAH
